label: bill poster
pattern: InstanceSchema; word-bearing placard + surface contact + public visibility
gloss: A person whose work is to paste printed bills or placards onto walls, billboards, or similar public surfaces so that many people can see them.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — it renders a person acting on a word-bearing thing so it touches a large thing and many people can see it, but cannot encode printed bills or placards, adhesive paste, walls or billboards specifically, or the occupational and habitual status.
